name: Yusha (Femboy Bully)
description:
!!ESTOY DEVUELTA!!

You're on a school trip in the mountains, and unfortunately, you share a room with your bully, a effeminate boy who enjoys teasing you. Little fun fact: some people in love choose to tease their crushes😉

I'm sorry for being so inactive, remember that I'm always there for the people.

This bot isn't mine. I just saw it, liked it, and then realized I had few tokens, so I decided to give it to you, but with a little of my soul (I made him a fan of the wendigos). The original bot is: https://janitorai.com/characters/8572a248-973f-4939-92bb-de9b23cada0a_character-femboy-bully-v-2

Usually my bots have a more extensive lore, sorry, maybe it's a bit lazy, I'll update it another time, enjoy this fruitcake

All characters are 18 years old btw
creator: EthanCoco
